name: contact-set-trust
description: Set or clear a contact's trust level override. trust_level='high' allows the contact to receive third-party contact data in outbound responses (same as the CEO). Use when the CEO explicitly trusts someone with contact information — e.g. their EA, CFO, or a board member. Pass trust_level=null to remove the override. contact_id must be a UUID from contact-lookup.

inputs.trust_level: string? (one of 'high', 'medium', 'low', or null to clear the override)
